commit.subject: LU-0000 osd: do not use features in osd_index_try()
commit.message:
LU-0000 osd: do not use features in osd_index_try()

it's not possible to transfer this information over
network, but we need to access remote indices.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly testgroup=full envdefinitions=SLOW=yes

Change-Id: Ia0968681410d853a80a032d882ec2fa504b07766
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
